test.notes: Full suite exited with only the 2 known pre-existing failures documented in AGENTS.md: aiOrchestratorService single-lane integration closing strategy and orchestratorService unified-attempt laneId handling. No additional failures were observed (1047 passed, 2 failed).

lint.notes: Lint is not configured in the project manifest.

blockingIssues.description: VAL-PLAN-003 is not met: planning workers are prompted to use ask_user, but the read-only planning allowlist in unifiedOrchestratorAdapter still omits mcp__ade__ask_user, so the planner cannot actually invoke it at runtime.

VAL-ART-001 is not met: reviewed production paths still register plan output through orchestrator artifacts rather than mission artifacts of type plan, so Evidence/Artifacts mission visibility is not proven.

VAL-PLAN-002 is not fully met: the implementation special-cases ~/.claude/plans sandbox-block text, but the broader ExitPlanMode/Zod validation failure path required by the contract is not cleanly handled or covered.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten service-worker guidance for validation-contract features so workers verify runtime tool allowlists and the actual persistence surface required by the contract, not just prompt text or lower-level artifact registry writes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The reviewed feature added tests that assert prompt text for ask_user and manual orchestrator artifact registration, while the actual runtime allowlist still omits ask_user for read-only planning workers and mission artifact visibility still depends on missionService.addArtifact.
